product_overview: SketchMotion is a collaborative storyboard web app for creating boards, sketching frames, applying AI polish, generating style-aware videos, sharing publicly, and exporting video presets. Users sign in with email/password, manage boards on a protected dashboard, and work on an infinite canvas with per-frame tools and AI workflows.
core_goals: Quickly sign in and access a personal dashboard of storyboards
Create new boards and open existing boards to work on an infinite canvas
Add, sketch, edit, and persist storyboard frames
Polish sketches into higher-fidelity images using the AI polish flow
Start style-aware video generation from frames using AI-guided prompts
Share boards publicly and open shared boards in an anonymous session
Export board video presets and preview export/player UI

features.name: Landing page
features.description: Unauthenticated visitors see marketing, product value, and entry points to sign in or sign up.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load home page and see primary hero/brand content -> Use CTA or navigation to reach auth

features.name: Email/password authentication
features.description: Users sign in or sign up with email and password and reach the dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Toggle sign-in mode if needed -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit form -> See /dashboard on success
Navigate to /auth -> Toggle sign-in mode if needed -> Enter email -> Enter incorrect password -> Submit form -> Observe error region

features.name: Protected dashboard
features.description: Authenticated users see their boards; unauthenticated visitors are redirected to the auth page.
user_flows: Visit /dashboard without session -> Be redirected to /auth
After successful login, visit /dashboard -> See board grid or empty state

features.name: Create and open board
features.description: Create a new board from the dashboard or open an existing board to work on the canvas.
user_flows: On /dashboard -> Trigger create new board control -> Land on the board canvas for the new board
On /dashboard -> Open an existing board from the list -> Land on the board canvas for that board

features.name: Frame creation and editing
features.description: Add storyboard frames on the infinite canvas, edit sketches in the sketch editor, and save updated frame state.
user_flows: On a board canvas -> Add a new frame or select an existing frame -> Open the sketch editor -> Draw or modify the sketch -> Save edits -> Confirm the frame appears with the updated image or state

features.name: Polished image save (AI polish)
features.description: Convert a sketched frame into a polished image using the AI polish flow and persist the polished image URL.
user_flows: On a board canvas with a frame that has a sketch -> Trigger the AI polish action for the frame -> Wait for in-flight UI (progress) or completion -> Assert the frame shows polished state or saved polished image when the API completes

features.name: Style-aware video generation
features.description: Open the AI panel to build prompts and start style-aware video generation that uses frame context and selected animation style.
user_flows: On a board canvas -> Open the AI panel -> Configure style and prompt inputs as needed -> Start generation -> Observe in-progress UI or spinner indicating job start
On a board canvas -> Open the AI panel -> Attempt to start generation without required prompt or style selection -> Observe validation message preventing start

features.name: Sharing and public board access
features.description: Owners can enable public access for a board, copy a share URL, and anonymous users can open the shared board subject to sharing settings.
user_flows: On a board canvas as owner -> Open the share UI -> Enable public access for the board -> Copy the share URL
In a fresh anonymous session -> Open the copied share URL -> Confirm the board loads for the anonymous user when public access is enabled

features.name: Export page
features.description: Access export UI for a board to choose presets, formats, and preview or play exported video versions.
user_flows: From a board canvas -> Navigate to the export UI for that board -> See presets list, format options, and the video player area or an empty state
Open the export UI for a board with existing exports -> See existing export versions listed and playback controls

routes.description: Marketing landing with hero, features, pricing, CTA
Email/password sign-in and sign-up; Google OAuth
Board list, search, create board, open board, archive/share metadata
Owner/editor infinite canvas, frames, AI polish, video generation, collaborators
Public or shared board view (optional auth); read-only rules depend on sharing_settings
Export presets, video versions, playback, share link UI

features.name: Landing page
features.description: Unauthenticated users see product marketing and navigation to auth
user_interactions: Load home page and see primary hero/brand content
Navigate toward sign-in (e.g. CTA or auth link)

features.name: Email password authentication
features.description: Sign in or sign up via Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Toggle sign-in vs sign-up if needed
Enter email in
Enter password in
Submit form to reach /dashboard on success
Observe error region on failure

features.name: Protected dashboard
features.description: Authenticated users see boards from Supabase; unauthenticated users redirect to /auth
user_interactions: Visit /dashboard without session and be redirected to /auth
After login, /dashboard loads board grid or empty state

features.name: Create and open board
features.description: Create new board record then navigate to canvas
user_interactions: Click create new board control
Land on /canvas/:boardId
Open existing board from list link to same route pattern

features.name: Frame creation and editing
features.description: Storyboard frames on infinite canvas; sketch editor saves to storage
user_interactions: Add or select a frame
Open sketch editor, draw or edit, save
Confirm frame appears with image or updated state

features.name: Polished image save
features.description: AI polish sketch to polished image and persist polished_url
user_interactions: Ensure frame has sketch
Trigger polish (per-frame or batch) and wait for completion or clear error
Assert polished state or saved image when API succeeds

api_calls.endpoint: Gemini / optional Replicate via edge functions

features.name: Style-aware video generation
features.description: AIPanel builds prompts and calls generateVideoFromFrame with animation style context
user_interactions: Open AI panel on canvas
Use style-aware video generation flow (prompt/step UI)
Start generation and observe in-progress UI or completion/error (may require API keys)

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase edge function generate-video / provider APIs

features.name: Sharing and public board access
features.description: sharing_settings.public_access controls /board/:id access; share URL uses /board/
user_interactions: As owner, enable public access in share UI
Copy or open /board/:boardId in clean session
Confirm board loads for anonymous user when public; access denied or limited when not

features.name: Export page
features.description: Export UI for board videos, presets, player, share controls
user_interactions: Navigate from canvas to export or direct URL with valid boardId
See presets list, format options, and video area or empty state

known_limitations.issue: AI polish and video generation require valid API keys and provider quotas; E2E may assert UI gates and errors without full media completion
known_limitations.impact: Tests should verify triggers, validation messages, and navigation rather than always waiting for final video file

known_limitations.issue: Google OAuth opens external provider; prefer email/password for automated login
known_limitations.impact: E2E login path should use email field and submit button
